pages.text: The villagers have joined the apocalypse reconstruction effort. They have supplies you need. Without them, you're like a gun without gunpowder...$(p)They have started $(l)selling/$ and $(l)recycling/$ things to help survivors, even things that shouldn't concern them...$(p)$(l)>>>/$ $(2)After trading, you can find more information in this book/$ $(l)<<</$
